questions.q: In a direct address to the nation, Prime Minister Mark Carney declared that Canada's close economic ties with which country have now become a "weakness" that must be corrected?

After being declared 'technically ready' by the European Commission in April 2026, an official age-verification app was bypassed by hackers in under two minutes—despite the developers already flagging the code as unfit for real-world use on which code-hosting platform?
Which Canadian astronaut was praised for speaking French during the Artemis II mission, helping heal tensions following a recent national language row?
A recent study of 16,000 patients revealed a 100% increase in drug poisoning hospitalization risk when gabapentinoids are taken alongside what other class of medications?
Fueled by a major surge in the entry-level 3D printing market, which company officially overtook Creality to become the world's top-selling budget 3D printer brand in 2026?
According to statements from President Donald Trump on April 19, 2026, the U.S. Navy struck and seized an Iranian-flagged cargo ship in the Gulf of Oman. What was the name of the vessel?
During its third launch in April 2026, Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket unfortunately placed which company's "BlueBird 7" cellular broadband satellite into an unusable, lower-than-planned orbit?
An analysis of 6.14 million health records found an increased risk of autism in children whose mothers were prescribed medications that inhibit the synthesis of what substance during pregnancy?
Parents in which province recently sounded the alarm that high rates of bullying are forcing them to keep their children out of school, leading to severe absenteeism?
On April 19, 2026, U.S. Customs and Border Protection launched the 'CAPE' portal to begin processing what specific transactions for American businesses?
